top_signals.summary: Passive investors set to dump billions of shares to make way for new stocks

top_signals.title: DNV: Why Hydrogen is Not the Next LNG
top_signals.summary: DNV’s Energy Transition Outlook Hydrogen to 2060 report explains why hydrogen won’t be the next LNG.LNG emerged to monetize geographically concentrated natural gas resources and move energy from a small number of exporting regions to distant markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Australian Quantum Sensor Company Raises Seed Funding
top_signals.summary: Deteqt, an Australian deep tech company building one of the world's most compact quantum magnetic sensors, has closed a A$5 million ($3.6 million) seed round led by Main Sequence, with participation from ATP Fund, BOKA Capital, Beaten Zone Venture Partners…
